calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing. The Personal Representative Shall File Either A Petition For Order For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report Of Status Of Administration Pursuant To Prob. Code Sec.12200 Et Seq. Two Weeks Before The Hearing Date.
Off Calendar May-18-2026 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-04-2026 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-14-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Deb Fox, Esq., for First Citizens Bank & Trust, Petitioner.

At the outset, the court and counsel discuss and determine whether any additional investigation should be required to identify and locate relatives of the decedent. The court acknowledges counsel's efforts with the preceding and confirms that there are no appearances to object to the instant petition. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Mar-27-2006 is admitted to probate. First Citizens Bank & Trust is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Frank Mahoney, III is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May-18-2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-07-2025 Continued To Apr-14-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
